sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19338" key="barba/ra" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βαρβάρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n19338.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">plaster,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:5:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
